definition: Every recursively tracked leaf blob in the frozen baseline Git tree is protected by path, mode, type, Git object identity, and content SHA-256. Working-tree bytes are never inventory authority.
nonclaims: software source removal only; not secure erasure
isolated subsystem copy only; not production-state or full-machine decommission
retained audit artifacts grant no live dispatch, restoration, or execution authority
no physical power-loss, production supervisor/provider, physical M4, or Tier 1 claim

removal_policy.policy: Every source delta must match exactly one class. Baseline modifications are restored from frozen Git blobs; executable or derived PLAN-005 additions are deleted; specifications, retained evidence, and verification tools remain non-executable audit history.

working_tree_exclusions.policy: These user-owned dirty working-tree bytes are never copied, read as evidence, edited, formatted, staged, or removed. Their committed baseline blobs remain protected entries.
